title: Honda Indonesia
description: An enterprise-grade web platform built for Honda Indonesia — full-stack development with a modern, scalable stack.
longDescription: An enterprise-grade web platform delivered for Honda Indonesia, built full-stack with a modern, scalable architecture.

title: Pusat Informasi Pasar Aman
description: A market-safety information system for BPOM (Indonesian FDA) — a comprehensive data-management platform.
longDescription: A market-safety information system built for BPOM (the Indonesian FDA) — a comprehensive platform for managing and surfacing market-safety data.

title: Scoresheets System
description: A dynamic scoring and evaluation system with real-time updates and comprehensive reporting.
longDescription: A dynamic scoring and evaluation system with real-time updates and comprehensive reporting for events and competitions.

title: MyMeet
description: A real-time meeting and collaboration platform with video conferencing, built with PeerJS and Socket.io.
longDescription: A real-time meeting and collaboration platform with video conferencing, built with PeerJS and Socket.io for low-latency communication.

title: Dapur Ilmu
description: An interactive e-learning platform with courses, progress tracking, and a full learning-management system.
longDescription: An interactive e-learning platform with courses, progress tracking, and a full learning-management system.
